steps.action: Run: python3 scripts/nim_router.py invoke --capability embed --text 'hello world'
steps.observed: Request built correctly, but API returned 404 - unauthenticated request rejected

issues.detail: The NVIDIA_API_KEY environment variable is not set. The request was built correctly and attempted to call https://ai.api.nvidia.com/v1/embeddings but received a 404 response, indicating the API gateway rejected the unauthenticated request.

blockers.description: NVIDIA_API_KEY not available in environment - cannot authenticate with NVIDIA NIM API
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - environment limitation, not a code defect

summary: Tested VAL-EMBED-003 (round 5): assertion BLOCKED - NVIDIA_API_KEY is not set. The embed capability code is working correctly (build-request returns valid JSON structure), but the invoke command cannot complete authentication against the NVIDIA API without an API key. This is an environment limitation, not a code defect. Previous rounds (2 and 3) documented the same blocker.
